title: Deploy a SpiderIQ Tenant Site
summary: Deploy a SpiderIQ tenant site to Cloudflare's edge in 2-5 seconds with the Phase 11+12 readiness → preview → confirm → poll pipeline. Use whenever the user says 'deploy', 'publish', 'go live', 'ship it', 'push to production', 'release the site', or any deploy-related request. Handles the readiness gate (rejects if any blocker is missing), snapshot-bound confirm tokens, status polling, and rollback if anything fails.
